templates.summary: Run the built-in -OVERKILL command (dialog-free command-line form) against the staged drawing to remove duplicate/overlapping geometry, using an explicit Numeric-fuzz tolerance sub-option.

tolerance.description: Numeric fuzz distance for -OVERKILL's 'Numeric fuzz' sub-option: two objects whose comparable properties (e.g. endpoints) fall within this distance of each other are treated as duplicates and one copy is deleted. No default -- a caller must decide this value explicitly rather than silently inherit AutoCAD's own near-zero exact-match default.

postconditions.description: Capture-only: OVERKILL deletes zero or more duplicate entities depending on what the staged drawing actually contains, so neither 'unchanged' nor 'increase' is a safe invariant to assert here (unlike AUDIT/PURGE/ARRAYRECT, which have a fixed structural relationship to entity count). before/after counts are recorded for evidence only -- no expect_unchanged/expect_increase is declared.

templates.notes: Not live-verified (status: catalogued, headless_safe: false pending measurement) -- unlike maintenance.drawing.audit/purge and the two DCM templates already in config/command_templates.json, this entry has not yet been run against real accoreconsole on this machine; the engine refuses it with ATTENDED_ONLY_TEMPLATE until a future lane clears the same live-measurement bar those four templates document in their evidence_refs. The command_sequence follows Autodesk's documented dialog-free '-OVERKILL' command-line form (select objects, end selection, choose the 'Numeric fuzz' [N] sub-option, supply the fuzz distance, accept the remaining option defaults with a blank confirmation to run), but the exact number of trailing blank confirmations needed to fall through to execution on this machine's locale/AutoCAD build is unmeasured. v1 scope limitation (documented, not hidden): only the 'Numeric fuzz' tolerance is exposed as a slot -- -OVERKILL also has an independent 'Gap tolerance' sub-option and several boolean Ignore-* toggles (color/layer/linetype/lineweight/etc.) that are out of scope for this drop-in. No paired config/operations.v2.json entry yet (out of scope for this disjoint drop-in file).
